summary: Completed comprehensive testing of backend refactoring and new video upload feature. All 33 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified for video upload section and profile page. Fixed minor frontend bug in stats endpoint URL.

integration_issues.issue: Was calling /api/stats/seeker which doesn't exist - should call /api/stats
integration_issues.fix_applied: Changed API call in SeekerDashboard.jsx from /api/stats/seeker to /api/stats

passed_tests: Auth - Login success returns token and user
Auth - GET /me returns current user when authenticated
Auth - Change password validates current password
Jobs - Seeker can get job listings
Jobs - Recruiter can get their jobs
Jobs - Seeker forbidden from creating jobs (403)
Applications - Seeker can check superlikes remaining
Applications - Seeker forbidden from applications list (403)
Video Upload - Delete forbidden for recruiters (403)
Push Subscribe - Works for authenticated users
Push Unsubscribe - Works for authenticated users
Manual: Video upload for seeker works (POST /api/upload/video)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring to routers/ directory is well organized (auth, jobs, applications, matches, notifications, uploads, stats)
Video upload feature properly restricts to seekers only (403 for recruiters)
All existing APIs continue to work after refactoring
Push subscription endpoints are available but frontend implementation not yet complete (as noted)
JWT secret key warning in logs - consider using 32+ byte key
seed_data_creation: Test recruiters and jobs created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has been refactored from single server.py into organized modules under /app/backend/routers/. Video upload feature for seekers is fully functional. Push notification subscription endpoints exist but frontend integration not complete yet. All tests passing.

backend_refactoring.shared_module: database.py contains models, utilities, and database connection

video_upload.endpoint_upload: POST /api/upload/video - Works for seekers, 403 for recruiters
video_upload.endpoint_serve: GET /api/videos/{filename} - Serves videos with correct content-type
video_upload.endpoint_delete: DELETE /api/upload/video - Removes video and clears user.video_url
video_upload.frontend: VideoUpload component on Profile page with preview, play/pause, and delete

push_subscription.subscribe: POST /api/push/subscribe - Saves subscription to user profile
push_subscription.unsubscribe: DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe - Removes subscription from user profile
push_subscription.frontend_status: Endpoints available, frontend implementation noted as incomplete
